arts.sum: The Belgian boss faces a huge week but his side must take care of Ross County first

arts.sum: Tottenham host Chelsea on Sunday in what should be an absolutely brilliant game in the Premier League. Chelsea and Tottenham always have incredible battles whenever...

arts.ttl: Spurs paying price for giving teams 'leg up' - Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou says his side must be more determined to stop opponents controlling games following a 1-0 defeat at Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Andre Villas Boas sends former club Chelsea FIFA Club World Cup warning
arts.sum: Andre Villas Boas has warned his former club Chelsea that the prize money for the FIFA Club World Cup is 'below initial expectations.' Chelsea and City have qualified for the Club World Cup by virtue of winning the Champions League over the course of the last four years.

arts.ttl: Tottenham informed whether 'world-class' midfield target will be leaving his club in January - Sky Sports
Tottenham could do worse than complete six-year transfer mission to sign forgotten Chelsea man - Lee Wilmot
arts.sum: But Spurs could do worse than look to a player they were linked with signing six years ago to help with their injury crisis at the other end of the field. Ben Chilwell was heavily linked with Spurs in 2018 before signing a new deal to stay at Leicester City.

arts.ttl: In search of the origins to the toxic Tottenham-Chelsea rivalry featuring meat hooks at White Hart Lane, electrified fencing at Stamford Bridge and some football in between
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL: In search of its origins, before there was even a flicker of a feud, Mail Sport was told to look back to the 1967 FA Cup final - or the 'Cockney Cup final' as it was christened.

arts.ttl: Team News: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Chelsea injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Tottenham Hotspur and Chelsea.
